**Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed that the 2026 World Cup will be his last, and it has now come to an end after Portugal's loss to Spain.**

## Context / Background
The 2026 World Cup has been an exciting tournament so far, with many top teams competing for the coveted title. Portugal, led by Cristiano Ronaldo, was one of the favorites to win the tournament. However, their journey has come to an end after a loss to Spain.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Goals | Possession |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Portugal | 0 | 55% |
| Spain | 1 | 45% |

> Ronaldo's statement that this World Cup is his last has sparked a lot of discussion about his legacy and what he will do next.

## What's Next?
Ronaldo has stated that he will take some time to decide on his future with the Portugal national team. This decision will be closely watched by fans and pundits alike.
